title: Cooperative endeavor agreement
doc_html:
§4738. Cooperative endeavor agreement

            The Louisiana Department of Health and the Department of Agriculture and Forestry shall enter into a written cooperative endeavor agreement authorizing the Department of Agriculture and Forestry to perform inspections in order to determine compliance with this Subpart.

            Acts 2009, No. 506, §1, eff. Nov. 1, 2009.
doc_text:
§4738.  Cooperative endeavor agreement
The Louisiana Department of Health and the Department of Agriculture and Forestry
shall enter into a written cooperative endeavor agreement authorizing the Department of
Agriculture and Forestry to perform inspections in order to determine compliance with this
Subpart.
Acts 2009, No. 506, §1, eff. Nov. 1, 2009.
